com.mentor.chs.api

Class IXGraphicConversions.XPDFContext

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.mentor.chs.api.IXGraphicConversions.XBaseContext
      • com.mentor.chs.api.IXGraphicConversions.XPDFContext
  • Enclosing interface:
    IXGraphicConversions

    public static class IXGraphicConversions.XPDFContext
extends IXGraphicConversions.XBaseContext
    Class grouping the input parameters needed for PDF conversion of a diagram. Defaults are supplied as part of initial values.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      IXGraphicConversions.XPDFColorChoice color
      Print color choice as per the XPDFColorChoice enumeration.
      float customPageHeightCm
      Page height specification is only used when selected page size choice is CUSTOM.
      float customPageWidthCm
      Page width specification is only used when selected page size choice is CUSTOM.
      double dashMultiplier
      Dash multiplier is used to modify the lengths of the dashes in Capital Tools.
      IXGraphicConversions.XPDFMargins margins
      Margins to be used on pages in generated PDFs
      IXGraphicConversions.XPDFPageSizeChoice pageSize
      Page Size choice as per the XPDFPageSizeChoice enumeration.
      IXGraphicConversions.XPDFPaperOrientationChoice paperOrientation
      Paper orientation as per the XPDFPaperOrientationChoice enumeration.
      IXGraphicConversions.XPDFPrintableAreaChoice printableArea
      Printable area choice as per the XPDFPrintableAreaChoice enumeration.

      • Fields inherited from class com.mentor.chs.api.IXGraphicConversions.XBaseContext

        m_backgroundColor, m_displayPlaneSpliceGraphics

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      XPDFContext() 

    • Method Summary

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Field Detail

      • pageSize

        public IXGraphicConversions.XPDFPageSizeChoice pageSize
        Page Size choice as per the XPDFPageSizeChoice enumeration. All page size choices are predefined, except CUSTOM which requires specifying customPageWidthCm and customPageHeightCm. Default: LETTER

      • customPageWidthCm

        public float customPageWidthCm
        Page width specification is only used when selected page size choice is CUSTOM. The value should be supplied in centimeters.

      • customPageHeightCm

        public float customPageHeightCm
        Page height specification is only used when selected page size choice is CUSTOM. The value should be supplied in centimeters.

      • printableArea

        public IXGraphicConversions.XPDFPrintableAreaChoice printableArea
        Printable area choice as per the XPDFPrintableAreaChoice enumeration. Default: FIT_TO_PAGE

      • paperOrientation

        public IXGraphicConversions.XPDFPaperOrientationChoice paperOrientation
        Paper orientation as per the XPDFPaperOrientationChoice enumeration. Default: LANDSCAPE

      • color

        public IXGraphicConversions.XPDFColorChoice color
        Print color choice as per the XPDFColorChoice enumeration. Default: BLACK_AND_WHITE

      • dashMultiplier

        public double dashMultiplier
        Dash multiplier is used to modify the lengths of the dashes in Capital Tools. Default : 1.0

        Example: A value of 2.0 will make the dashes twice as long the default while 0.5 will make them half the length.

      • margins

        public IXGraphicConversions.XPDFMargins margins
        Margins to be used on pages in generated PDFs

    • Constructor Detail

      • XPDFContext

        public XPDFContext()
